zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Ferrers於1236年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby44歲，母親Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby35歲。她於1251年之前與Baron William de Vaux結婚。她去世於1274年10月16日在英國肯特利德斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國肯特利德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Ferrers于1236年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby44岁，母亲Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby35岁。她于1251年之前与Baron William de Vaux结婚。她去世于1274年10月16日在英国肯特利德斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国肯特利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Ferrers was born in 1236, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 44 and her mother, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, was 35. She married Baron William de Vaux before 1251. She died on 16 October 1274, in Leeds, Kent, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Leeds, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Ferrers est née en 1236, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Baron William de Vaux avant 1251. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1274, à Leeds, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Leeds, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Ferrers 1236 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 44 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby 35. Sie hat vor 1251 Baron William de Vaux geheiratet. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1274 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Leeds, Kent, England und wurde in Leeds, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Ferrers è nata il nel 1236 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Baron William de Vaux prima del 1251. Morì il 16 ottobre 1274, nel Leeds, Kent, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Leeds, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Ferrersが1236年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは44歳，母Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derbyは35歳であった。1251年以前にBaron William de Vauxと結婚した。彼女は1274年10月16日にイギリスケントリーズで38歳で死去し，イギリスケントリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Ferrers(이)가 1236년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1251년 이전 Baron William de Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1274년 10월 16일 영국 켄트 리드즈에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 리드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Ferrers nasceu em 1236, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron William de Vaux antes 1251. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1274, em Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Leeds, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Ferrers родилась в 1236 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron William de Vaux перед 1251 г. Она умерла 16 октября 1274 г. в местности лидс, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности лидс, кэнт, Англия.
